create.title: Create {entity}

category.desc: Add a category with an optional parent and storefront visibility.

collection.desc: Add a collection name, handle, and storefront visibility.

error.backend: The commerce backend is temporarily unavailable.
error.credentials: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Contact support.
error.genericSave: {entity} could not be saved. Try again.

create.handleCustom: Handle editing is unlocked for a custom {entity} slug.
create.parentDesc: Nest under another category, or leave as a top-level root.
create.visibleDesc: Hidden {entityPlural} stay in the dashboard but are not listed publicly.

table.emptyMessage: Create a category to organize products in your shop.
table.filteredEmptyMessage: No categories match the current search.
table.collectionsEmptyMessage: Group products into a collection for merchandising and campaigns.

delete.title: Delete {entity}
delete.desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
delete.batchDesc: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected {entityPlural}? This action cannot be undone.

form.handleUnlocked: Handle editing is unlocked for a custom {entity} slug.

edit.categoryDesc: Update name, handle, parent, display order, and storefront visibility.
edit.collectionDesc: Update details, SEO, and which products belong in this collection.
edit.name: Name
edit.title: Title
edit.parentHelp: Cannot nest a category under itself or one of its children.
edit.siblingOrderHelp: Order among categories under the same parent. Smaller numbers (0, 1, 2…) appear first in the store. For many categories, use drag Reorder instead.
edit.visibleCategoryDesc: Hidden categories stay in the dashboard but are not listed publicly.
edit.visibleCollectionDesc: Hidden collections stay in the dashboard but are not listed publicly.
edit.seoCategoryHelp: Optional title and description stored with the category.
edit.seoCollectionHelp: Optional title and description stored with the collection.
edit.categorySaveFailed: Category could not be saved. Try again.
edit.collectionSaveFailed: Collection could not be saved. Try again.
edit.backendUnavailable: The commerce backend is temporarily unavailable.
edit.credentials: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Contact support.
edit.productsHelp: Search and multi-select products to add. Membership saves immediately.
edit.noProductsYet: No products in this collection yet.

reorder.title: Reorder categories
reorder.description: Drag categories under the same parent. The top of each list is first in the store (0, then 1, then 2…).

listError.setupDesc: {label} could not be loaded because catalog services are not ready. Contact an administrator or retry after setup is complete.
listError.serviceDesc: {label} could not be loaded right now. Retry after the catalog services are available.

deleteErrors.catalogUnavailable: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Try again.
deleteErrors.catalogContactSupport: Catalog changes are temporarily unavailable. Contact support.
